creator: dan@langille.org
text:
On Mon, January 25, 2010 2:08 pm, Andrei V. Lavreniyuk wrote:

> /usr/bin/ld: warning: libssl.so.6, needed by /usr/local/lib/libpq.so,
> may conflict with libssl.so.7
>

Wondering if this is an openseel port

>
> /usr/bin/ld: warning: libcrypto.so.6, needed by /usr/local/lib/libpq.so,
> may conflict with libcrypto.so.7

No idea what may have caused this.  Are you installed ports up to date?

I ask because I just tried a make here and it did not encounter these errors:

FreeBSD building.example.org 8.0-STABLE FreeBSD 8.0-STABLE #1: Fri Dec 18
02:04:40 EST 2009     dan@polo.example.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/PHENOM



>
>
> dird.o(.text+0x226): In function `check_catalog(cat_op)':
>
>
>
> : undefined reference to `db_check_max_connections(JCR*, B_DB*, unsigned
> int)'

This makes me think there are other errors higher up.  If you find them,
please let me know.

Thank you.


-- 
Dan Langille -- http://langille.org/
